summary: Successfully tested Email Report Settings feature - all backend APIs and frontend UI components working. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all elements are present and interactive. NOTE: RESEND_API_KEY is not configured in backend/.env, so actual email sending is SKIPPED (returns status='skipped', reason='API key not configured'). This is expected behavior.

email_settings_get_api.returns: settings object with email_enabled, email, send_hour, send_empty_reports, timezone + owner_email

email_settings_put_api.validation: Validates send_hour 0-23, rejects invalid values with 400

send_test_report_api.note: Returns status='skipped' when RESEND_API_KEY not configured

scheduler_startup.log_message: Daily report scheduler started - checking every hour

elements_verified: Email Address input with placeholder showing owner email
Daily Report Time dropdown (0-23 hours format)
Send reports with no sales toggle
Info box with report contents list
Summary cards (Total Sales, Total Orders, Average Order, Items Sold)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Email settings are correctly persisted to member_pages.report_settings in MongoDB
✓ Scheduler uses APScheduler with CronTrigger(minute=0) to check hourly
✓ Email sending gracefully handles missing RESEND_API_KEY (returns skipped status)
✓ Frontend correctly shows email placeholder from owner's email
✓ Toast notifications show success/error messages appropriately
⚠ RESEND_API_KEY is empty in backend/.env (line 34) - emails will be SKIPPED until configured
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test page and POS transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Report Settings feature is fully implemented. APIs work correctly. UI is functional with toggle, email input, time selector (0-23h), empty reports toggle, Save Settings and Send Test buttons. RESEND_API_KEY must be configured in backend/.env for actual email delivery. Currently emails are SKIPPED with status='skipped', reason='API key not configured'. Scheduler runs hourly to check for pages needing reports sent.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/reports_section.png - Daily Sales Report with summary cards, hourly chart, top products
.screenshots/email_settings_final.png - Email Report Settings component with all UI elements visible

mocked_api.note: Email sending returns 'skipped' status when RESEND_API_KEY not configured - this is expected behavior, not a mock
